demographics.living_situation: lives with partner, who has taken leave from work to provide full-time care

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm so exhausted I can barely lift my head, my joints are aching constantly, and my urine looks like black tea.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The tiredness has been building for weeks but the last three days it's crashed — I'm stuck in bed, my urine has gone really dark, and my partner says the whites of my eyes look yellow.

symptom_narrative.onset: the exhaustion crept in gradually over about the last 4 weeks, then got dramatically worse over the past 3 days
symptom_narrative.duration: 4 weeks of build-up, severe for 3 days
symptom_narrative.character: a bone-deep, overwhelming tiredness plus aching joints; the urine has turned dark like black tea and my partner says my eyes look yellow
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst tiredness of my life — I'm bedbound and can't get through normal daily tasks
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the aches are in the small joints of my hands and wrists, and they seem to move around
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, but the yellow tinge seems to come and go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — resting doesn't shift the tiredness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it's just been getting worse on its own over the last few days
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: dark urine, my partner noticing yellow eyes, a faint rash on my chest and trunk, and my periods have been very irregular and light lately
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt run-down before but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm bedbound and can't complete my normal daily activities; my partner has taken leave to look after me

past_medical_history.how_managed: on insulin, I check my blood sugars regularly and they've been in my usual range

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my partner is present and has taken leave from work to care for me full-time

objective_data_offered.value: urine looks like black tea / very dark brown over the past few days
partner says the whites of my eyes look yellow and my skin has a yellow tinge that seems to come and go
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: lay observation of skin/eye colour over a video call, not a clinician assessment of icterus

objective_data_offered.value: a faint blotchy rash over my chest and trunk
home glucometer readings have stayed in my usual range
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported home glucometer trend, no specific values provided
